category_sources: Official projectM documentation describes projectM as an open-source cross-platform music visualization library designed to replicate MilkDrop behavior.
source_facts.description identifies projectM as a Milkdrop-compatible music visualizer.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README and official documentation use the projectM name.
source_facts.homepage uses the official projectM repository.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README points developers to the wiki for developer documentation.
Official projectM website hosts user documentation under /docs/user/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/projectM-visualizer/projectm, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes projectM as a cross-platform music visualization library.
